# v5.1 Social Launch Kit / 社区发布素材

Use only after `python scripts/ai_delivery_spec_cli.py status` and the release
checks agree. Never turn `experimental`, `partial`, or `not_run` into a stronger
claim.

仅在状态报告与发布检查一致后使用；不得把 `experimental`、`partial`、
`not_run` 改写成更强的成熟度结论。

## One-line positioning / 一句话定位

AI Delivery Spec is an open-source requirement-management kernel: lightweight
for ToC idea-to-PRD work and deep for governed ToB/ToG requirements. It manages
intake, clarification, one unified PRD, change, traceability and acceptance.

AI Delivery Spec 是需求管理内核：ToC 想法到 PRD 可以轻量使用，ToB/ToG 复杂
需求可以深度展开；默认只有一份人类可读、AI Coding 可执行的统一 PRD。

## Role hooks / 角色钩子

- PM: stop losing page effects, state boundaries, and acceptance between PRD and prototype.
- Architect: keep requirement, module, permission, interface and change contracts traceable.
- Coding agent user: block invented fields, states, permissions, and business rules.
- QA/customer delivery: trace every acceptance path back to evidence and decisions.

## Awesome-list entry

```md
- [AI Delivery Spec](https://github.com/franklinxkk/ai-delivery-spec) -
  ToB/ToG requirement-management kernel for intake, clarification, one unified
  PRD, prototype requirements, change, traceability, and acceptance.
```

## Evidence-backed proof points / 可引用证据

- requirement intake, value/complexity bands and smart tier recommendation;
- guided clarification with P0-unknown blocking;
- one Human-First PRD with engineering/Coding Agent annexes;
- optional schema-governed Product Truth for large/audited projects;
- change impact, diff, approval and synchronization contracts;
- bidirectional traceability and evidence-bound acceptance runs;
- generic Project Domain Capsule fallback;
- seven maturity-declared domain packs, all currently `experimental`;
- 15 pinned GitHub cases and explicit `partial/not_run` matrix;
- deterministic cross-platform release checks.

Do not claim general quality improvement, production behavior, domain expert
approval, customer acceptance, safety, legal, financial, or regulatory
correctness without new evidence.

## Suggested topics

```text
product-management, requirements-engineering, spec-driven-development,
enterprise-software, tob, tog, prd, requirements-management, traceability,
ai-coding, coding-agent, acceptance-criteria, prototype, brownfield, agent-skills
```
